ValidationRule.description: Only PM is allowed to change this information
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.IsProjectManager__c=false, OR( ISCHANGED(ContractPartner__c), ISCHANGED(RecordTypeId), ISCHANGED(OwnerId), ISCHANGED(ProjectCostCenter__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectResponsibleBusiness__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectStartDate__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectStatus__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectStatus__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectSubType__c), ISCHANGED(Name), ISCHANGED(ProjectCurrency__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have the permission to change this information. Please get in touch with the Project Manager. (PR019)
